hook: Sitting too long can negate your workout benefits.

script.hook: Did you know that prolonged sitting can harm your health, even if you exercise regularly?
beats: Research shows that sitting for long periods can reduce the effectiveness of your workouts.
Just 2-3 minutes of light movement every 30 minutes can reactivate important enzymes in your muscles.
Regular 'exercise snacks' can improve your glucose levels and cognitive function.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Visual of someone sitting at a desk with a timer showing 30 minutes.
Animation showing the enzyme activity dropping as sitting continues.
Clip of someone standing up and doing light stretches or walking.
Text overlay summarizing the benefits of exercise snacks.

captions.instagram: Prolonged sitting can negate your workout benefits. Just 2-3 minutes of movement every 30 minutes can help! #ExerciseSnacks #HealthTips
captions.facebook: Did you know sitting too long can harm your health even if you exercise? Try short movement breaks to stay healthy! #ExerciseSnacks
captions.tiktok: Sitting too long can cancel out your workout gains! Just a few minutes of movement every half hour can make a difference. #HealthHack
captions.youtube: Sitting for long periods can negate your workout benefits. Discover how short movement breaks can improve your health!

titles.facebook: Why Sitting Too Long Can Hurt Your Health
titles.tiktok: Sitting Too Long? Here's Why It Matters!

complianceNotes: Do not imply diagnosis or treatment.
Retain at least one meaningful caveat from the article.
